text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we're getting to the bottom of<n>what the Grand
Concert really means,<n>the fans watching our
journey<n>volunteer to help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their input inspires Light Hello, who<n>proposes we
let fans speak freely<n>during the concert and asks
the<n>students to listen to the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up on stage, the girls are showered in<n>sentiments
from the audience. It turns<n>out that the fans had
feelings of their<n>own to convey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Light Hello is convinced<n>once and for
all that the Grand<n>Concert is necessary for both
runners and fans.
